hdabb3b7eg6331g4d40g9d9bg176a2e2b50ed: You! I knew you'd been mucking with our beer! You poisoned us!
ha40b5dfbgf360g4432g860fgb0f61ae79cd8: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
had421a0dgb00bg4d12gb63bg4974035e26fe: You poisoned yourselves. This is Elderberry Beer - goblins are allergic to it.
hde82c034g3d7eg405agb3bag23a80298c463: A-allergic? You mean just the beer can kill us?! G-get out of my way. I need some fresh air.
h44bd5c18g75dbg439bg813eg07764c6d56c4: If I'd poisoned you, do you really think I'd still be here?
h8b6de211g3086g4e63ga7d3g8ab3b3c0c050: Tnak, you're right. Whoever did this could be anywhere by now.
h644402edg908ag4b5bga046g00c0f298e048: Or you just thought we'd be stupid enough to believe ya!
hf52dd5f8g06e6g4872g9458ga92c6f6bd3af: I did, but I can slit your throat if you'd prefer a quick death.
h2d2d8c3cg8427g49c1g978ag5f65e66471f6: P-please don't! I won't rat you out, I swear! J-just leave me be.
hf68750ecgb457g4892ga4bcg31c6ccafd599: Th-this one's all right, lads! Knows nothin' about no poisonin'!
heeac8925g4e22g43f0g96e0g111116bc2053: Yes, unfortunately. Ripping your arms off would have been more fun.
h766f66d2g488cg4069g882bg48eb17434ef2: Consider it a privilege. I could have just gutted you.
h1ad3dd2eg0169g4808g9854g5d2d61bd93ac: I knew we shouldn'tve taken that fancy berry beer. Could've tasted the poison if it hadn't been so sweet.
hfd504babgcf58g412fg8207g15cbef50515b: What are you... this one's tryin' to control my mind or somethin'!
h3fe72047g9326g4922ga27ag4a81e50cb31f: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
ha52132bbg42e7g49fegbbe5gf486f69cf828: And why would I do that? I'm a True Soul.
h34238d13g2103g4f50gac82g65a8da3747ac: V-very sorry - I didn't know. I swear I didn't know!
h5491cd80gf016g4c47g9563g419e19dc5edc: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
hcead7af2gf3e4g4e6egb80cg93bfe421bd3e: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
he01e27c1gf780g45f2g92f4gaf2ebc542c99: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h28b257a5g7ae2g4651g9142gfcafedcf8b46: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hffce63ecgd1ebg4013gbf57g486adf66f9ba: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h2e4260c8g59b3g4c81gbf2eg8ed3a49e0494: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
hba13a0e9g5c66g4d6cg902egb90cbaf0943f: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hcee8c448g75f5g4b89gade3g07aa51782562: You? You're smaller than a worg whelp. Guys - get this idiot!
h5cf09a0fg5948g4668g8bcbgb5e4ad5a6f1e: You, a True Soul? I'd be shakin' in my boots if you were, but all I'm feelin' is the urge to see your guts.
h335f674fgfbe7g4750gadb8g9a5fcf9714d7: And why would I do that? I'm a True Soul.
h13dbc24egcec3g4a3fgb81bg790edd5aab90: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
